common.questions_reply: Have questions? Reply to this email and we’ll help you.
common.ignore_if_not_requested: If you didn’t request this, you can safely ignore this message.

verification.subject: Verify your email address — Feyra
verification.heading: Verify your email address
verification.body: Thank you for creating an account with Feyra! Click the button below to verify your email address and activate your account. The link is valid for 24 hours.
verification.ignore: If you didn’t create an account, you can safely ignore this message.

password_reset.subject: Reset your password — Feyra
password_reset.heading: Reset your password
password_reset.body: We received a request to reset the password for your Feyra account. Click the button below to choose a new password. The link is valid for 30 minutes.

welcome.subject: Welcome to Feyra!
welcome.heading: Welcome to Feyra!
welcome.body: Thank you for signing up for Feyra! We’re excited to help you manage your email outreach and lead generation.
welcome.info: Get started by connecting your email accounts and importing your first leads. Feyra will handle the warmup and deliverability for you.

campaign_sent.subject: Campaign sent successfully — Feyra
campaign_sent.heading: Your campaign has been sent!
campaign_sent.body: Your campaign “{campaign_name}” has been sent to {recipient_count} recipients.
campaign_sent.info: You can track opens, clicks, and replies in real time from your dashboard.

lead_import_complete.subject: Lead import complete — Feyra
lead_import_complete.heading: Lead import complete
lead_import_complete.body: Your lead import has been completed. {imported_count} leads were successfully imported.
lead_import_complete.info: Duplicate and invalid entries were automatically skipped.

warmup_status.subject: Warmup status update — Feyra
warmup_status.heading: Warmup status update
warmup_status.info_active: Warmup is progressing well. Your sending reputation is building up gradually.
warmup_status.info_complete: Warmup is complete! Your email account is ready for full-volume sending.
warmup_status.info_issue: There was an issue with warmup. Please check your email account settings.

payment_confirmation.subject: Payment confirmed — Feyra
payment_confirmation.heading: Payment confirmed
payment_confirmation.body: Your payment of {amount} has been successfully processed. Thank you for your subscription to Feyra.
payment_confirmation.info: Your next billing date is {next_billing_date}. You can manage your subscription at any time from the dashboard.

payment_failed.subject: Payment failed — Feyra
payment_failed.heading: Payment could not be processed
payment_failed.body: We were unable to process your latest Feyra subscription payment. Please update your payment method to avoid service interruption.
payment_failed.warning: If the payment is not resolved within 7 days, your subscription will be paused.

trial_ending.subject: Your Feyra trial ends in 3 days
trial_ending.heading: Your trial is ending soon
trial_ending.body: Your Feyra trial ends on {trial_end_date}. Upgrade now to keep using all features without interruption.
trial_ending.info: After the trial, your campaigns and warmup will be paused.
